headline: How The Investment Narrative For Pfizer (PFE) Is Shifting On Pipeline Hopes And Revenue Risks
summary: Pfizer’s implied fair value per share has edged up from US$29.08 to US$29.19, while some price targets on the stock cluster around US$26 and into the low to mid US$30s. This reflects a split view across Wall Street, with some analysts leaning on product exclusivity and pipeline potential, and others stressing the US$15b to US$20b revenue cliff and limited visibility on future catalysts. As you read on, you will see how these moving targets shape the evolving analyst story around Pfizer and...
